sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: General Motors Co의 공시 핵심을 한국어로 요약했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 3분기 매출 486억 달러, 순이익 13억 달러, EBIT-adjusted 34억 달러 — 전년 대비 EBIT-adjusted 및 순이익 모두 하락
2025년 연간 가이던스 하향: 순이익 77억~83억 달러(기존 77억~95억 달러), EBIT-adjusted 120억~130억 달러로 상단 축소
3분기 EPS-diluted 1.35달러(전년 2.68달러), EPS-diluted-adjusted 2.96달러; 자동차 영업현금흐름 전년 대비 감소

riskChanges.text: 3분기 EBIT-adjusted 마진 6.9%(전년 8.4%): EV 관련 비용 및 자동차 영업 환경 악화 반영; 순이익 마진도 크게 축소

businessChanges.text: 9개월 누적 자동차 영업현금흐름 42억 100만 달러(전년 동기 58억 3,400만 달러) — 현금 창출력 약화로 연간 목표 달성에 압박
가솔린차와 광범위한 EV 포트폴리오 병행 전략 유지; 전기차 전환 비용이 단기 수익성에 지속 부담

financialHighlights.text: 3분기 매출 485억 9,100만 달러(전년 487억 5,700만 달러); 순이익 13억 2,700만 달러(전년 30억 5,600만 달러)
EBIT-adjusted 42억 100만 달러(9개월 누적); 자동차 영업현금흐름 9개월 누적 42억 100만 달러(전년 58억 3,400만 달러)
2025년 연간 가이던스: 순이익 77억~83억 달러, EBIT-adjusted 120억~130억 달러

watchItems.text: 연간 가이던스 하향이 일시적 요인인지 구조적 수익성 악화인지 판단이 4분기 실적 발표 시 명확해질 것
9개월 누적 자동차 영업현금흐름 42억 100만 달러(전년 58억 3,400만 달러) 하락 추세가 연말 목표 달성의 핵심 변수

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 gmq32025pressreleaseandfin.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 News For Release: Tuesday, October 21, 2025, at 6:30 a.m. ET GM releases 2025 third-quarter results DETROIT – General Motors (NYSE: GM) today reported third-quarter 2025 revenue of $48.6 billion, net income attributable to stockholders of $1.3 billion, and EBIT-adjusted of $3.4 billion. GM is also updating its 2025 full-year earnings guidance: Updated 2025 guidance Previous 2025 guidance Net income attributable to stockholders $7.7 billion - $8.3 billion $7.7 billion - $9.5 billion EBIT-adjusted $12.0 billion - $13.0 billion  Normalized numeric aliases: $48.6 billion = 486억 달러; $1.3 billion = 13억 달러; $3.4 billion = 34억 달러; $7.7 billion = 77억 달러; $8.3 billion = 83억 달러; $9.5 billion = 95억 달러; $12.0 billion = 120억 달러; $13.0 billion = 130억 달러; $12.5 billion = 125억 달러; $11.0 billion = 110억 달러; $7.7 = 7.7달러; $10.0 = 10.0달러; $20.5 = 20.5달러; $8.22 = 8.22달러; $9.05 = 9.05달러; $9.97 = 9.97달러; $9.75 = 9.75달러; $10.50 = 10.50달러.

$10.00 An overview of quarterly results and financial highlights appears below. Visit the GM Investor Relations website to download the company's earnings deck and GM Chair and CEO Mary Barra's Letter to Shareholders. Conference call for investors and analysts Mary Barra and GM Chief Financial Officer Paul Jacobson will host a conference call for the investment community at 8:30 a.m. ET today to discuss these results. Conference call details are as follows: • 1-800-857-9821 (U.S.) • 1-517-308-9481 (international/caller-paid) • Conference call passcode: General Motors • An audio replay will be available on the GM Investor Relations website in the Events section. 1 Results Overview Three Months Ended ($M) except per share amounts September 30, 2025  Normalized numeric aliases: $10.00 = 10.00달러; $1,327 = 1,327달러; $3,056 = 3,056달러; 48,591 million = 485억 9,100만 달러; 48,757 million = 487억 5,700만 달러; 1,327 million = 13억 2,700만 달러; 3,056 million = 30억 5,600만 달러; 1,729 million = 17억 2,900만 달러.

offer a broad portfolio of innovative gasoline-powered vehicles and the industry’s widest range of EVs, as we move to an all-electric future. Learn more at GM.com. ### CONTACTS: Jim Cain GM Communications 313-407-2843 james.cain@chevrolet.com Ashish Kohli, CFA GM Investor Relations 847-964-3459 ashish.kohli@gm.com David Caldwell GM Communications 586-899-7861 david.caldwell@gm.com Cautionary Note on Forward-Looking Statements : This press release and related comments by management may include “forward-looking statements” within the meaning of the U.S. federal securities laws. Forward-looking statements are any statements other than statements of historical fact and represent our current judgment about possible future events.
